description: Timing planes. A duration's plane travels with it everywhere (metric, bar, export row); planes are never mixed silently.

sameProcessMonotonic.meaning: Both endpoints from one process's monotonic clock.

epochAligned.meaning: Endpoints aligned by wall clock across processes (e.g. STS spans in an extension-anchored waterfall).

derived.meaning: Computed from other metrics via a declared derivation formula.
derived.eligibility: inherits the weakest input plane; requires a derivation block
